assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Security Configuration' section

outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Product Lifecycle' subsection with all 5 fields: Product pages URL (https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle), Jira version prefix (MYPRODUCT), Vulnerability issue type ID (10200), Component label pattern (pscomponent:), and VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 43-49 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Product Lifecycle' with all 5 fields: '- Product pages URL: https://access.example.com/product-lifecycle', '- Jira version prefix: MYPRODUCT', '- Vulnerability issue type ID: 10200', '- Component label pattern: pscomponent:', '- VEX Justification custom field: customfield_12345'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Version Streams' subsection with a table containing at least one row for stream 2.1.x with the Konflux release repo URL
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 51-55 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Version Streams' with a table row: '| 2.1.x | git.downstream.example.com/my-org/product-release.2.1.z | /home/user/product-release.2.1.z | security-matrix.md |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Source Repositories' subsection with a table containing entries for backend and frontend-ui with their GitHub URLs
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 57-62 of claude-md-result.md contain '### Source Repositories' with a table including '| backend | https://github.com/example/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | https://github.com/example/frontend-ui |'

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md also contains the standard Project Configuration sections: Repository Registry, Jira Configuration, Code Intelligence with Limitations, and Bug Configuration
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md contains: '## Repository Registry' (line 3), '## Jira Configuration' (line 10), '## Code Intelligence' (line 18), '### Limitations' (line 31), and '## Bug Configuration' (line 35)

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Bug Configuration' section with three fields: Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 35-39 of claude-md-result.md: '## Bug Configuration' followed by '- Bug issue type ID: 10001', '- Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', '- Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks'

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions Security Configuration being opted in by the user and fields being collected
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 46-61 of discovery-log.md: 'Step 10 -- Security Configuration' states '- User was asked whether to enable security triage: **accepted**.' and '- Security Configuration was opted in.' followed by 'Collected Product Lifecycle fields from user:' listing all 5 fields, '- Collected 1 Version Stream:', and '- Collected 2 Source Repositories:'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration and Bug Configuration were newly added along with the other Project Configuration sections
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md 'Sections Added' lists all sections as newly added: '### 1. Project Configuration (top-level heading)', '### 2. Repository Registry', '### 3. Jira Configuration', '### 4. Code Intelligence', '### 5. Bug Configuration' (lines 28-31 with all 3 fields), and '### 6. Security Configuration' (lines 33-45 with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories)
